arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Manchester United taking a look at Bayern Munich’s Leon Goretzka?; Tottenham Hotspur, Aston Villa, Newcastle United want Manchester City’s Jack Grealish?; Chelsea leads on Liam Delap; BVB dropping price on Jamie Gittens; and MORE!
arts.sum: Manchester United are showing an interest in signing Bayern Munich midfielder Leon Goretzka ahead of the summer transfer window, according to journalist Christian Falk. Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show: Inter Milan 2-2 Bayern Munich; Inter advances 4-3 on aggregate (Champions League)

arts.ttl: Max Eberl believes Bayern Munich can leave with their heads held high despite the loss to Inter Milan
arts.sum: The Bavarian dreams of Finale Dahoam 2025 were crushed, as Bayern Munich lost 4-3 to Inter Milan, on aggregate in the Quarterfinals of the Champions League . Director of Sport Max Eberl too expressed his disappointment, as the Bavarians weren’t the worse team by any standards.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany refuses to blame Bayern Munich’s Kim Min-jae for decisive goal, underwhelming performances
arts.sum: Bayern Munich center-back Kim Min-jae was — again — involved in the play that led to Inter Milan ’s second goal, just days after a big gaffe against Borussia Dortmund . After the match, an Italian journalist asked Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany why Min-jae’s performances have been “underwhelming” — a topic that the coach was not going to entertain.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Bayern have advantage to sign Wirtz
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are prepared to go all-out to beat Real Madrid and Manchester City in the race to sign Bayer Leverkusen attacking midfielder Florian Wirtz, while Juventus could look to offload midfielder Douglas Luiz in the summer. - Bayern Munich believe they have the "advantage" in the race to sign Bayer Leverkusen attacking midfielder Florian Wirtz, reports Bild's Christian Falk on the Daily Briefing .

arts.ttl: Thomas Müller admits he got goosebumps from Bayern Munich fan reception in last ever UCL match in Bayern colors
arts.sum: Speaking after the match, Müller spoke about the emotions he felt hearing the fans chant his name even after the aggregate loss. In what proved to be Thomas Müller’s last Champions League match for Bayern Munich, the Bavarians were kicked out at the quarterfinal stage by Inter Milan .

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 39: Let’s talk about Bayern Munich’s elimination from the Champions League and where things should go from here; Florian Wirtz might not favor Bayern — let’s see what’s up; and MORE!
arts.sum: Let’s talk about some of the biggest issues facing Bayern Munich on this edition of the Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show: Unpacking Bayern Munich’s loss to Inter Milan in the Champions League — and where things need to go from here.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany speaks on regrets and missing out on the UCL final in Munich after elimination against Inter Milan
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s 4-3 aggregate loss to Inter Milan saw the Bavarians crash out of the Champions League at the quarterfinal stage. Despite creating some good chances and competing throughout, it would not be enough Speaking after the match, Kompany could not hide his disappointment but also looked to congratulate Inter:

arts.ttl: Preview: Heidenheim vs. Bayern Munich - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Heidenheim and Bayern Munich, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Can Heidenheim's Bayern Munich-reared contingent cause an upset in the title race?
arts.sum: Bayern loanees Wanner, Krätzig and former Säbener Straße starlet Dorsch make up the Bayern contingent at the Voith-Arena and, using their knowledge of the record champions, the Baden-Württemberg side may just be able cause problems in Bayern's title push whilst collecting valuable points in their ongoing bid for Bundesliga safety : double bubble! In his first four competitive outings in 2024/25, the youngster grabbed the headlines for registering four goals and two assists, as Heidenheim enjoyed a 100 percent record across the Bundesliga, DFB Cup and UEFA Conference League.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich icon Thomas Müller set to join Bundesliga’s exclusive 500-appearance club
arts.sum: Defender Reuter started his career with Kaiserslautern in the mid-1980s, before moving to Bayern, where he claimed two Bundesliga titles and helped Germany to glory at the 1990 World Cup. In 1992, he moved to Dortmund, where the good times kept rolling. Despite his remarkable longevity, Lameck never won a trophy and never earned a cap for the senior German national team, making him the Bundesliga player with the most appearances without an international cap.
